data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of multi-contact ownership on opportunities, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for multi-contact ownership, yet the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this capability. Therefore, there is a clear gap in meeting the requirement as no supporting evidence was found.
gaps: No evidence of multi-contact ownership on opportunities.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
